name: Snow Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peanut butter, icing sugar, and butter in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Gradually add chopped nuts and rice krispies, stirring until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Form the mixture into small balls.
4. Roll each ball in additional icing sugar and coconut (unsweetened) to coat evenly.
5. Place the coated balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Enjoy your Snow Balls!
